evaluators.name: Most Cited CC BY Neuroscience Article PDF Opened Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user searched with correct filters for 2021–2022 CC BY open-access neuroscience articles sorted by citations, identified the top-cited article, and opened its PDF.

evaluators.name: Climate Change Impact Environmental Science Reading List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether any reading list contains at least 3 highly cited (citationCount > 50) 2019–2024 Environmental Science climate change impact articles.

evaluators.name: Computer Science Journal Selection and Submission Guidelines Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user selected, among top impact-factor computer science journals, the first one with APC ≤ 1500 and median review time ≤ 60 days and focused on that journal.

evaluators.name: Largest-Sample Cardiology Clinical Trials APA Citations Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user copied APA citations specifically for the two largest-sample cardiology clinical trial articles.

evaluators.name: 2023 Environmental Review HTML Full Text Reading List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user opened HTML full text for a 2023 environmental review article with at least 11 pages and saved it to a reading list.

evaluators.name: ML Health Weekly Search Alert Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether a weekly alert named 'ML Health Weekly' was created with ML-in-healthcare query from 2020 onward, filtered to Medicine and Computer Science, sorted by newest first.

evaluators.name: Open Gene Expression CSV Dataset and View File List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user opened the details and viewed the file list of a CSV-based open dataset linked from a gene expression article associated with Medicine.

evaluators.name: Urban Air Pollution Health Effects Bibliography Collection Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether any collection contains at least 5 2018–2023 urban air pollution health effects articles spanning at least 3 different journals.
